scenarios.title: loads demo page and completes async JavaScript evaluation @positive
scenarios.userAction: Navigate to the Bonigarcia Selenium WebDriver demo homepage and execute a Promise-based timeout via page.evaluate(), then assert the page title is present as the minimum observable-outcome assertion (reviewer should replace with exact title — see Q4).
expectedAssertions: page title matches /.+/ after navigation (weak guard — reviewer must supply exact title per Q4)
page.evaluate() with Promise-based timeout resolves without error

locatorTable.notes: Mechanical navigation translation; host moves to baseURL in playwright.config.ts. No element locators exist in the source — this is the only locator-equivalent entry.
